partsUsed: Leaves and bark (distillate water widely sold)
traditionalUsesEn: Traditional astringent for skin; modern witch hazel water as topical toner after distillation.
traditionalUsesDe: Äußerlich adstringierend bei Haut und Venen in der nordamerikanischen und modernen Tradition.
activeCompounds: Tannins (hamamelitannin), flavonoids; distillate mainly aqueous aromatics
preparation: Topical distilled witch hazel USP; leaf/bark decoctions traditionally.
cautions: External use preferred for commercial distillate. Internal tannin-rich preps can irritate.
historicalNotes: Name from Middle English wiche (pliable); Native and settler medicine.
preparationDe: Destillat und Extrakte äußerlich; handelsübliche Gesichtswasser.
cautionsDe: Vor allem äußerlich. Gerbstoffreicher Extrakt kann austrocknen.
